text:
おかえりなさい！
戻ってくるの、待ってたよー！

幻惑の森での騒動が落ち着いたって
みんなから聞いたよー！
これで心置きなく新年祭を楽しめるね！

この後のイベント準備は
わたしの腕の見せ所、だね！

たくさん手伝ってくれてありがとう！
また良かったら
Welcome back! I've been waiting for you!

People are saying things have calmed down in
the Bewitched Woods! Now people can enjoy
New Year's with a clear conscience!

Now it's time for me to roll up my sleeves and
get to work setting up the festival!

Thanks for all of your help! Don't forget,
there's always room to do more!
